content:
## Hi 

Welcome!

We're inspired by your commitment to becoming the best version of yourself. Now comes the next big part: sticking with it.

Don't worry — our experts have developed this Plan to help you achieve your goals.

<page-separator/>

### Liven is your self-discovery companion

Over the next few weeks, we'll figure out how your past is still affecting you today and help you reshape your path to healing. You'll reflect on your thoughts, feelings, and reactions as you build habits that boost resilience, openness to new experiences, and inner peace.

### Let us walk you through the process:

After the first chapter, you'll complete a simple activity to help identify the roots of your struggles.

There are no right or wrong answers, so just be honest — this will help us tailor your Plan.

<page-separator/>

### What happens next

Once we understand the impact of your past experiences, we'll address them step by step, focusing on the core elements of cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT): **thoughts, emotions, and behaviors.**

1. First, we'll explore how **unconscious thoughts** can trigger and reinforce patterns that keep you stuck.
2. Next, we'll look at the **feedback loop between thoughts and feelings**, which — yep, you guessed it! — keeps those patterns going.
3. Once you understand why you feel the way you do, we'll focus on changing your **behavior** to support your healing.

It'll take effort — tracking your mood, analyzing triggers, and reflecting on your thoughts and reactions.

The work is yours — but it'll be worth it.

<page-separator/>

### "I am proud of myself for showing up, even when it's hard."

Come back to this affirmation when your goal feels too far to reach — even small progress is still progress.

### We're proud of you, too!

Healing from past trauma takes time, but you've already started — the rest will follow.

There's no rush. Change takes time, and it’s okay to go at your own pace. We're always here — ready whenever you are.
